summary.summary: Updates the OmnipodKit submodule reference: Subproject commit changed from 4d254498cf016806b3e0ec33dd5fbfdf6e2135a6 to d75f218131225d3faa51daca0a004952d06c9b8f. (PR and commits titled "Bump OmnipodKit, fixes #1236".)
summary.userFacingImpact: This change updates only the OmnipodKit submodule pointer. The patch as shown is a submodule commit bump and does not itself include code changes in this repository; therefore any functional or runtime impact (including the referenced "fixes #1236") is not verifiable from this change alone and should be validated by a human reviewer against the OmnipodKit upstream changes.
